flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwestern Michigan College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwestern Michigan College rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.8k → $13.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwestern Michigan College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwestern Michigan College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.0k → $12.5k).
